narrative:
03 Ohio House district has 70,906 registered voters, with 61.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 28.3 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +14.2% D−R vs +38.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
